ad Hey Guys! Like many of you I’ve been getting Christmas ready this week. 
It can be a busy time of year so I wanted to quickly share with you some easy tips that will help you protect your flooring during the festive period. 
With the help of @carpetright_uk here are some ways in which you can prepare. 
* Place off cuts of carpet under heavy furniture and Christmas trees to protect your flooring. 
* Use runners and mats in high traffic areas like hallways. This will help to trap any dirt and moisture that people may bring in. 
* Use a rug to not only make your room look beautiful but also protect the flooring in high traffic areas or where drinks could be spilt. 
* In the case of a spillage take a look at our video for the best way to remove stains quickly and efficiently. Clumsy Nat 😉 
Also check out our stories for the links to the products featured. I’m so pleased with the all the items I’ve got. Don’t forget you can head over to the @carpetright_uk page for all the expertise and advise you need for all things flooring related! 🌲♥️
.
.
.
.
.
#CarpetrightXmas #Carpetright #christmasready #christmastips #twinklecleaningduo #christmas2021

AD We are working with @cif_uki this #recyclingweek to bring you our top recycling tips. 
As the caption says, little efforts can make a big difference! Cif is working hard to play its part towards a Clean Future and so should we. 
All bottles within the Cif range are fully recyclable once the sleeve is removed, and some bottles like our favourite Cif Cream are being made with recycled plastic included. Cif isn’t stopping there though, as it continues to strive towards more Clean Future goals. 
We love that by using Cif we can get the clean we deserve and can also contribute to the wellbeing of our planet at the same time. Cif believes that we should have the ability to enjoy both aspects and so do we. 
We hope you enjoy our tips and would love to hear your favourite recycling tips too ♻️
.

latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Yesterday I got round to cleaning my front door and porch area. This is an area that takes quite a hit often due to weather conditions and can get forgotten about as we focus on the insides of our home. 
I wanted to give all the Facias, Guttering and Soffits some special attention too. 
All I needed was 
🧼 a bucket of washing up liquid, 
🧼 a @minkyhomecare Minky, 
🧼 Microfibre cloths,
🧼 a dust pan and brush, 
🧼 a broom 
🧼 my @hozelock hose reel, 
🧼 glass cloths 
🧼 squeegee 
and I was able to get it sparkling again! ❇️ 
Will you be giving your porches some love now? 🏡 
.
.
.
.
.

latestIgtvVideos.title: 𝐃𝐎 𝐘𝐎𝐔 𝐍𝐄𝐄𝐃 𝐎𝐔𝐑 𝐇𝐄𝐋𝐏? 🤗
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
If the answer to this question is yes then please read on!
🧼 We are looking to help an individual or family who may have experienced a tough time recently or for a long time and who needs help to get back on top of their cleaning. This may be yourself or someone you know. 
🧼 We want to come and clean one room or area in your house (at no cost) that needs the most attention to help you get back in control and leave it in a condition where you feel you can tackle it yourself going forward 
🧼 The person we help must be based within 25 miles of Gatwick
🧼 We will be filming the process for our Instagram so you will need to feel comfortable being on camera with us please consider this if nominating someone else. 
🧼 We will be adhering to strict covid regulations. 
🧼 Please share this video if you know someone it could help 
.
🧼To apply: Email management@twinklecleaningduo.com with your full name, location, telephone number and why you/ or someone you know may need help with cleaning and how you think we can help, plus a photo of the room that you would like cleaned. Unfortunately, due to the volume of entries you will only hear from us if you are successful. 
.
T&Cs
Must be over 18 years old. Must be located within 25 miles of Gatwick. Due to COVID safety restrictions certain guidelines will apply, and at all other times social distancing will be in place. You give permission for you and your home to be filmed, with footage going live on Instagram. Closing date for entries is midnight on 25/03/21 
.
#givingback #helpinghand #doyouneedhelp #helpingothers #helpeachother #positivevibes #cleaningaddict #cleaninginfluencer #cleanhomehappyhome #tidyhousetidymind #cleaningup #twinsofinstagram #twinklecleaningduo

latestIgtvVideos.title: 1001 Spring Fest with @twinklecleaningduo
latestIgtvVideos.caption: #ad Join us as we share our top Spring Cleaning Tips and Tricks with @1001carpetcare

latestPosts.caption:
Hi Guys,
This week we have made a big decision but in honesty it’s been brewing for a while. 
We have decided it’s time for us to close our account down. 
We’ve loved our time on Instagram over the last few years, it’s bought amazing opportunities and we have met and spoken to incredible people but running an account even with 3 of us takes so much time away from living our own lives. We are family girls and that’s where we have chosen we want to put our time now. 
Instagram has changed a lot over the years and it’s become harder and harder to keep up with all the changes that go on and knowing what the app wants from you week to week rather than concentrating on all those that follow you. It really plays with your mind. 
We want to thank you all for your love, kindness, support and advice and also all the brands we’ve worked with too. We appreciate it so much ❤️ 
We feel this will be a really positive step for us and our families. 
We will leave this post on for a few days before deactivating. 
Take care each and everyone of you. 
Lots of love Nat, Kat & Charlotte xxx

latestPosts.caption:
𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐂𝐋𝐄𝐀𝐍 𝐔𝐏 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐓𝚰𝐍𝐔𝐄𝐒 
—————————————————————————————
If you’d seen my stories Sunday morning, I shared my garden looking all tidy and organised after the crazy party the night before. I couldn’t be bothered to do much else that day so I decided to leave the indoors until yesterday to tackle. It actually wasn’t that bad, I just needed to catch up with some washing and give the house a light tidy up. 
One area that did take a battering though was my stair carpet and I needed to tackle the muddy foot prints on my wool carpet which were from Graces dirty bare feet Saturday night 💃 - she didn’t realise. 
Then the girls who’d enjoyed dips and crisps upstairs before the party and left in the dressing room leaked as I took it down stairs yesterday, not what I needed 🫣 
The Rug Doctor Spot & Stain Remover Wipes are actually really good, I’d definitely recommend getting some. 
Who knows what else I would have been cleaning if I hadn’t kept the teens outside #mumsofteenagers 
.
.
.
.
.
#partyathome #aftermath #cleaningup #afterpartyclean #cleaningaccount #cleaningmotivation #carpetcare #carpetclean #watchmeclean #howtoclean #mumlife #mumsofinstagram

latestPosts.caption:
𝐁𝐑𝐈𝐍𝐆𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐍𝐈𝐆𝐇𝐓𝐂𝐋𝐔𝐁 𝐓𝐎 𝐘𝐎𝐔 💃 
————————————————————
Last night was a double celebration for Grace. Not only is it her 16th birthday this week but she and her friends have all just completed their GCSEs exams so it was definitely time to let their hair down and have some fun. 
Can you even believe that you can hire an inflatable night club! Well that’s exactly what we did and to be honest I’m a bit jealous it wasn’t around when I was younger because it was brilliant. 
As you can see from the video grace and her friends absolutely loved it! 
Definitely check out @partypodevents if you want to see more. 
Tag a friend who would love this 🪩🎵
.
.
.
.
#inflatablenightclub #sweet16 #schoolsoutforsummer #gcsesdone #birthdayparty #birthdaygirl #partyideas #partytime #celebratethegoodtimes #celebrations #teenagerparty #partyathome  #dancelikenooneiswatching

𝐀𝐍 𝐀𝐋𝐆𝐀𝐄 𝐏𝐑𝐎𝐁𝐋𝐄𝐌 𝐒𝐇𝐀𝐑𝐄𝐃 𝐈𝐒 𝐀 𝐏𝐑𝐎𝐁𝐋𝐄𝐌 𝐇𝐀𝐋𝐕𝐄𝐃!
———————————————————————————————
When I spotted my garden shed covered in algae I knew I was in for a satisfying clean 🙌🏻
In order to kill the algae without being harmful to wildlife I mixed a solution of one part white vinegar to one part water. So I started my clean by using my pressure pump and hose to cover the areas in this solution. 
Next up I hosed it all off with ease using my jet wash and what a difference!!
Follow @twinklecleaningduo for more cleaning tips. 
.
.
#satisfyingclean #satisfyingvideos #filthyclean #beforeandafterclean #beforeandafters #cleaningproductsthatwork #cleaningistherapy #cleaningaddict #cleaningaccount #cleaningmotivation #shedclean #algaeremoval

latestPosts.caption:
𝐁𝐄𝐃𝐒𝐇𝐄𝐄𝐓 & 𝐌𝐀𝐓𝐓𝐑𝐄𝐒𝐒 𝐂𝐋𝐄𝐀𝐍 𝐊𝐈𝐍𝐃 𝐎𝐅 𝐃𝐀𝐘 🛌 ☀️ 
——————————————————————————————
I don’t know about you but for me this weather is making light work of deep cleaning tasks that take twice as long in the winter 🙌🏻
Yesterday I managed to clean all my bedding as well as the mattress and still have them dry again before bed last night 🎉
My top tips for looking after my mattress are. 
🧼 Always vacuum the mattress first when cleaning to remove dust particles and mites. 
🧼 Use products like Surf Detergent that’s tough on stains and Dettol laundry sanitiser which kills 99.9 % of bacteria to wipe over surfaces that can’t be washed easily. 
🧼 When deep cleaning I make sure I air my bedding and quilts for a few hours before putting on fresh bedding.
🧼 I also highly recommend using a mattress protector all year round and pillows that have removable covers, mine are from Simba.
.
What’s your best tip when doing this task?
.
.
.
.
.
#summerclean #summercleaning #mattressclean #deepclean #howtoclean #cleaningproduct #cleanwithme #cleanfluencers #cleaningmotivation #cleaningmakesmehappy #cleaningaccount

latestPosts.caption:
𝐅𝐋𝐎𝐖𝐄𝐑 𝐃𝚰𝐒𝐏𝐋𝐀𝐘 𝐓𝚰𝐏 🌹 
——————————————————————————————-
Good morning and Happy Sunday. Hope you are all enjoying your weekend so far. 
I thought I would quickly share this simple and easy tip on how to keep your flowers standing evenly in your vase. 
I often use oasis to keep my flowers in place but I have recently tried some chicken wire inside the vase too which is really effective because the small and even holes are perfect to slot the stems into keeping the flowers spread out and standing tall. 
Have you tried this before?
.
.
.
.
.
#flowerdisplay #flowers #flowersofinstagram #tipsofinstagram #tipsandtricks #flowertips #homedecor #homeorganizing #organising #organisemyhome #organisedlife #sundaymotivation

latestPosts.caption:
𝐒𝐇𝐎𝐖𝐄𝐑 𝐇𝐄𝐀𝐃 𝐂𝐋𝐄𝐀𝐍 🚿 
—————————————————————-
Happy Saturday. It’s due to be a hot few days so yesterday I deep cleaned my shower head. I don’t know about you but I can always tell when mines due a clean because the water start’s shooting in different directions 😂. 
I started by going straight in with my @cif_uki Power Mousse and one of the reasons that I love it so much is because you can physically see when the product has fully covered the area you are cleaning. I worked that in with a soft bristle toothbrush which is great at gently cleaning around the little silicone heads before rinsing it. 
I then used @cif_uki cream cleaner and a cloth to remove any remaining limescale. 
It’s currently shining and flowing properly again. 
Will you be cleaning this weekend?
.
.
.
.
#showerheadclean #limescaleremoval #limescale #showerclean #deepclean #deepcleaning #cleaningmotivation #cleaningproductsthatwork #cleaningproducts #cleaningaccount #satisfyingcleaning #satisfyingvideos

𝐈’𝐥𝐥 𝐌𝐀𝐊𝐄 𝐈𝐓 𝐔𝐏 𝐓𝐎 𝐘𝐎𝐔 💄 
————————————————————————————-
Our poor makeup bags really do suffer with unwanted mess don’t they! 
I decided to give some love to mine recently. I started by spraying the inside of it with @acecleanuk Power Mouse to help break down the build up of makeup residue. 
I then turned it inside out and without rinsing the product off used my @oxo brush to give it a really good scrub. Once done I then gave it a wash with fresh water and an air dry in the sun. It’s now fresh and ready to use again 🙌🏻
Hit the save button for when you want to do yours ♥️
.
.
.
.
.
